title: Cowboy Clean Fuels Announces Completion of Carbon Removal and Renewal Natural Gas Production Method
content: Cowboy Clean Fuels, a clean energy and climate technology company with an office in Gillette, has announced the completion and release of its groundbreaking Biomass Carbon Removal and Storage, plus Renewable Natural Gas, or BiCRS+RNG, methodology. This framework establishes a rigorous approach for measuring, monitoring, reporting and verifying a novel form of carbon removal, which combines biogenic methane production with permanent carbon dioxide sequestration in geologic formations using existing energy infrastructure.
author: Analysts Account
